since_last: 41% of 100 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +3.02%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 41% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.17% · Gold -0.16% · Nasdaq100 -0.59%. 41% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +3.02%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +3.02%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -3.33%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at +27.47%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +27.47%, BABA +5.60%, AAPL +3.75%, ISRG +3.67%, PINS +3.45%. Laggards: DELL -12.20%, MU -8.44%, ANET -7.32%, AMBA -7.12%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.16% at $136.3
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.16% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
